news.t: Best Low-Volatility ETFs for When the Market is a Roller Coaster

holdings.infoBox: XMLV is an equity ETF with a total of 83 individual holdings. The top holdings are TXNM Energy stock at 2.90%, OGE Energy at 1.66%, NNN REIT at 1.64%, W. P. Carey at 1.62%, and Agree Realty at 1.60%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P MidCap Low Volatility ETF (XMLV) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P MidCap 400 Low Volatility index. The fund tracks a volatility-weighted index of the 80 least volatile S&P 400 companies. XMLV was launched on Feb 15, 2013 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Best Low-Volatility ETFs for When the Market is a Roller Coaster
data.text: It's been a volatile few years for the stock market, and that has investors sniffing out low-volatility ETFs. Just understand their strengths and their limitations.
